headline: How The Best Buy (BBY) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reassess Risks And Rewards
summary: Best Buy’s model fair value estimate has been cut from US$82.38 to US$74.85, a 9.1% reduction that signals a more cautious stance around where the stock might reasonably trade. This shift lines up with Street research, which has broadly trimmed price targets after Q4 results and updated guidance, while still splitting on how attractive the risk and reward now looks. As you read on, you will see how these moves fit into the evolving analyst narrative and what to watch next as that story...
